name: power-platform
description: Power Platform specialists (now 11, including the new power-platform-tester and the existing power-bi-engineer) with Capability Grounding Protocol, maintainability-review skill, expanded house-opinions hook (8 grep-able checks for §3/§4), and strong ALM/git coverage for solutions, flows, and PBIP projects. Also bundles the community pbix-mcp server (d0nk3yhm/pbix-mcp, MIT) for reading, writing, and DAX-evaluating Power BI .pbix/.pbit files without Power BI Desktop — requires `pip install pbix-mcp` on the consumer machine.
